title: ハイド・アンド・シーク！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through the central plaza during
lunch, I encounter a familiar figure...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You seen Flower 'round these parts?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm in a real tight spot! If I don't find her soon,
then—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like it's my win. Time's up!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Lost another one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I looked high and low, but I couldn't track ya
down...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You must be the hide-and-seek champ, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's quite the compliment, Taiki. It's nice of
you to say, but I'm a little embarrassed...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You bet we were! My little sisters couldn't get
enough of it back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That was the deciding round. And I've got just the
prize for ya, Flower—a big hug for all that good
hidin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, c'mere so I can give ya a squeeze! You've
been such a good girl!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, Taiki! Um... Why don't we go for one
more game since we're already here?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's an idea! Since my trainer's around,
why don't all three of us play together?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You two go and hide! I'll definitely find y'all
before time's up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle runs to a tree and starts counting.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'd better make sure she doesn't find me. Hehe...
Truth is, I haven't lost a single round yet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There aren't really any good places to hide, so I
was sure she'd spot me. But as it stands, she hasn't
found me once!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And when I was it, I found her in no time.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You know, I just might be really good at
hide-and-seek.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I was a little down in the dumps earlier, but
I'm starting to feel better now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My race didn't go as well as I'd hoped... but then
Taiki came to see me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She said, "It only takes a good belly laugh to send
the blues packin'!"

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Taiki compliments me every time I hide really
well. When she does, my heart feels all warm and
fuzzy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, we should probably hurry and find our hiding
places.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to hide over there. Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she finishes counting, Taiki begins her
search. And just one minute later...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... I know you're here somewhere,
Trainer—I can smell ya! Come out, come out,
wherever ya are!
choice_data_list: Stay put and wait it out!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Aha! There ya are, Trainer! Don't think I'm gonna
let ya hightail it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to make a getaway, but with Taiki Shuttle as
my opponent, a successful escape is out of the
question.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I had no idea ya were so speedy, Trainer!
Guess that means I don't need to go easy on ya.
Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So you're playin' the waiting game, are ya? I'm
pretty good at that myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, is that you I hear rustlin' leaves? I know
you're there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. You gotta wake up pretty early in the
mornin' to escape a sharpshooter like me!
choice_data_list: I can't believe you found me so easily.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're no youngster, so I thought I'd spare the
theatrics I put on for my little sisters!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, now to find Flower!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Flooower! Where are youuu? I'm gonna find
ya even if it means I gotta run laps 'round the
whole school!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle continues her search with a big smile
on her face, all the while pretending not to notice
Nishino Flower's half-hidden tail.
